title: woodsia × maxonii
intro: Woodsia × maxonii is a rare, sterile hybrid fern species resulting from the cross between Woodsia obtusa and Woodsia ilvensis, belonging to the family Woodsiaceae. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Woodsia × maxonii may include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Woodsia × maxonii is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
